name: Roast Rack of Lamb with Parsleyed Crumbs
recipeIngredient: 1 well-trimmed rack of lamb, room temperature (1-1/2 pounds)
recipeInstructions:
1. Position the rack in the center of the oven and preheat to 450°F.
2. Season the lamb with salt and pepper.
3. Brush the lamb with 1 tablespoon mustard.
4. In a small bowl, combine the remaining 2 tablespoons mustard with the bread crumbs, parsley, rosemary, and garlic.
5. Press the crumb mixture over the top of the lamb.
6. Arrange the lamb in the roasting pan with the crumb side up.
7. Roast for 10 minutes.
8. Reduce the heat to 400°F and roast until a thermometer inserted into the center of the meat registers 135°F for medium rare, about 15 more minutes.
9. Let the lamb stand for 10 minutes before carving.
10. Carve the lamb, cutting between ribs, and serve.
